questions.text: Which of these is a renewable resource?
questions.explanation: Wind energy is renewable as it is continuously available. Petroleum, coal, and natural gas are non-renewable fossil fuels.

questions.text: Recycling helps in conservation of resources.
questions.explanation: Recycling converts waste materials into new products, reducing the need for raw materials and conserving resources.

questions.text: What is the main aim of conservation?
questions.correctAnswer: To protect and preserve natural resources for future generations.
questions.explanation: Conservation aims to protect biodiversity, prevent resource depletion, and maintain ecological balance.

questions.text: The Chipko movement started in ________ state.
questions.explanation: Chipko movement started in 1973 in Uttarakhand (then Uttar Pradesh) to protect trees from cutting.
